children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out the functions and responsibilities of the Secretary under this subchapter and the Agreement $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2006 through 2010.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: b Commission
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out functions and responsibilities of the United States Section $150,000 for each of fiscal years 2006 through 2010.1So in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1

children.heading: Alaskan cooperative management program
children.label: c Alaskan cooperative management program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out this subchapter and the Agreement in Alaska $150,000 for each of fiscal years 2006 through 2010.
